package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "testing"
)

// Positive scenario for shared_integration_test_setup_not_centralized_under_test_support: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Repeated app, DB, or router bootstrapping that is not moved into shared test support.
type CaseSharedIntegrationTestSetupNotCentralizedUnderTestSupportDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSharedIntegrationTestSetupNotCentralizedUnderTestSupportModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSharedIntegrationTestSetupNotCentralizedUnderTestSupportRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSharedIntegrationTestSetupNotCentralizedUnderTestSupportModel
}

type CaseSharedIntegrationTestSetupNotCentralizedUnderTestSupportService struct {
    repo *CaseSharedIntegrationTestSetupNotCentralizedUnderTestSupportRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSharedIntegrationTestSetupNotCentralizedUnderTestSupportAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSharedIntegrationTestSetupNotCentralizedUnderTestSupport(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSharedIntegrationTestSetupNotCentralizedUnderTestSupportDTO) error {
    focus := "shared_integration_test_setup_not"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseSharedIntegrationTestSetupNotCentralizedUnderTestSupportDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    testCase := struct { name string; raw string }{"full stack", input}
    _ = (*testing.T)(nil)
    _ = testCase
    shared_integration_test_setup_not_positive := map[string]int{"shared": 1, "integration": 2, "test": 3, "setup": 4, "not": 5, "centralized": 6}
    shared_integration_test_setup_not_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    shared_positive_0 := shared_integration_test_setup_not_positive["shared"] + len(input)
    _ = shared_positive_0
    integration_positive_1 := shared_integration_test_setup_not_positive["integration"] + len(input)
    _ = integration_positive_1
    test_positive_2 := shared_integration_test_setup_not_positive["test"] + len(input)
    _ = test_positive_2
    setup_positive_3 := shared_integration_test_setup_not_positive["setup"] + len(input)
    _ = setup_positive_3
    not_positive_4 := shared_integration_test_setup_not_positive["not"] + len(input)
    _ = not_positive_4
    centralized_positive_5 := shared_integration_test_setup_not_positive["centralized"] + len(input)
    _ = centralized_positive_5
    return nil
}
